title: Stronger blocks
description: Adds a few stronger variants of basic blocks, that are more blast resistant but dont take long to break
body:
Tired of creepers and TNT tearing through your builds, or having no way to defend against OP weapon mods. This mod introduces stronger variants of basic blocks such as **cobblestone**, **deepslate** and their **brick** variants.

Features:

- Reinforced versions of common blocks
- **Higher blast resistance** to withstand explosions
- Still **easily minable** with the almost all pickaxes
- Easy to craft with basic resources needed
- Harder to craft **blast proof** versions
- Great for survival bases, to defend against weapons or mob-proof builds

Keep the look and feel of vanilla Minecraft while giving your structures the extra durability they deserve!

**Curseforge:** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stronger-blocks
